description:
Virtual Haptic Point sampler is a component that is used as a way of picking up haptic sensations from the virtual environment inside Resonite, without needing a haptic device. This can be used as a way of making a device that beeps as it detects vibrations, temperature, pain, and force. It can also be used as a way of relaying vibration sensations via API to vibration devices not supported by Resonite, like speakers with base.

This works as part of the game's robust Haptics system.

fields.Radius: The radius of the sphere for this.
fields.ShowDebugVisual: Whether to show the debug visual for this sampler.
fields._debugVisual: the material on the sphere of the current generated debug visual. Is null when ``ShowDebugVisual`` is false.
fields.Force: The force sensations picked up by this haptic point sampler.
fields.Pain: The pain sensations picked up by this haptic point sampler.
fields.Temperature: The temperature sensations picked up by this haptic point sampler.
fields.Vibration: the vibration sensations picked up by this haptic point sampler.
